Term Sheet for Proposed Acquisition of 60% equity in Kelana Synergy Berhad (“Target”) — dated 12 June 2026
Buyer: Aurora Meridian Berhad (Company No.: 202401012345 (1509873-D)) of Level 12, Menara Selangit, Jalan Damai 5, 50450 Kuala Lumpur
Seller: Kelana Holdings Sdn. Bhd. (Company No.: 201801234567 (1287654-P)) of Suite 8, Pusat Niaga Andalas, 47500 Subang Jaya
The Target is listed on Bursa Nusantara Securities Berhad (fictional exchange); announcements shall comply with Malaysian Listing Requirements and the CMSA
Primary contact: Encik Farid Jalal bin Roslan (NRIC 800101-14-5678), e m a i l: farid.roslan@kelana-holdings.com.my, tel +60 12 3 4 5 6 7 8 9
Secondary contact: Puan Liyana bt. Mahmud (Passport No. A12345678), legal@aurora-meridian.com.my; role: the CFO will countersign
Indicative consideration: MYR 248,000,000 cash, subject to completion accounts; payment to Malaya Commerce Bank Berhad Account No.: 765432109876; Swift: M C B M M Y K L
Conditions precedent include approvals from the Buyer’s shareholders, the Securities Commission of Malaya (fictional), and Bursa Nusantara, and no material adverse change in the Target group; this sentence does not refer to a MAC address (not 00:00:00:00:00:00)
This term sheet contains non-public, price-sensitive information and trading on the Target’s securities is prohibited until formal announcement on the exchange
Personal data herein (as defined under the Malaysian PDPA: information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable data subject) will be processed for KYC and closing only; do not send passport scans by reply-all
An announcement draft shall be submitted within one market day of signing via the e-announcement portal at https://room.nusantara-exchange.my/deal?target=KSB-2024&ssm=1509873-D
Form placeholders for circulation only: Name: ______; I/C: 000000-00-0000; Tel: ______; this line is non-binding and not a data field
Buyer Income Tax No.: C1234567890X (invalid checksum example, not for filing); general queries should go to support@helpdesk.example rather than deal contacts
Public helpline: 1-300-88-8888 (general info only; not a transaction contact); public reference: http://info.example.my/faq
C o m p a n y   N o . ( B u y e r ): 2 0 2 4 0 1 0 1 2 3 4 5   ( 1 5 0 9 8 7 3 - D ); internal ref: pelangi-phase1 in lowercase project-management prose
